# Lexis - AI Chinese Dictionary

## What Lexis Does

Lexis is a Chrome extension for Chinese language learners. It provides AI-powered contextual definitions directly on any webpage, with an adaptive learning system that simplifies explanations based on your vocabulary.

## Target Users

- Chinese language learners reading native content
- Students studying Chinese using web resources
- Anyone learning Chinese who wants contextual definitions without leaving their reading

## Key Features

- Select any Chinese word for instant AI definitions
- Mark unknown words to get simpler explanations (without those words)
- Vocabulary notebook auto-saves marked words
- 5 interface languages: Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish
- All data stored locally for privacy

## Pricing

- Free to install
- Requires user-provided AI API key (OpenAI or Anthropic)

## Product Type

Chrome Extension (Browser Extension)

## Official Links

- Website: https://lexis.waterlee.site
- Privacy Policy: https://lexis.waterlee.site/privacy
